name: Alert Dispatcher
description: Reads the completed risk report and dispatches alerts via configured notification sinks: Slack for HIGH+ findings, email for the security team, and a webhook for the ticketing system.

checks.prompt:
Generate notification payloads for the following security audit report:
{report_input}

Produce:
1. Slack message JSON (blocks format) — summary card with risk posture badge and top 3 actions
2. Email HTML template — for security team distribution
3. Jira/Linear issue JSON — one ticket per Critical finding

Context: {retryContext}
